allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d mapdata -c "SELECT DISTINCT properties->>''feature_type'' as feature_type FROM features WHERE properties->>''feature_type'' IS NOT NULL;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d mapdata -c "SELECT properties FROM features WHERE properties IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d mapdata -c "SELECT DISTINCT properties->>''feature_type'' as feature_type FROM features WHERE properties->>''feature_type'' IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT ''road'' FROM features WHERE properties->>''source'' = ''openstreetmap'' AND road_type IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT ''streetlight'' FROM features WHERE icon = ''💡'' UNION SELECT DISTINCT ''traffic_light'' FROM features WHERE icon = ''🚦'';")
